summary: Resource discovery infrastructure — FTS5 index covers resources/, discover-resources primitive, validate-output-coherence sub-skill, SOP tier/resource_discovery pattern with reasoning layer (3 exemplar checkpoints in audit-meta-global).
notes: Safe additive overlay. Index extension non-breaking (new source_type=resource, existing types untouched). validate-output-coherence is a sub-skill with operator_facing=false — invisible unless invoked by an orchestrator. After install, rebuild the index once with .skills/memory-index.py to populate resource chunks.

changes.note: Added index_resources() covering resources/{frameworks,guides,catalogues,sops,conventions,quality-specs,templates,routing}. Markdown chunked by ## headings (small files = 1 chunk). Optional YAML frontmatter parsed. Validated on loom: 44 resource chunks indexed from existing template.

CLI primitive. FTS5 MATCH over resource chunks, BM25 ranking + optional recency boost. Auto-escape queries. Source_types filter (framework/guide/catalogue/sop/convention/quality-spec/template/routing). Format text or json.

Sub-skill (operator_facing: false, invocable_by: all). Four checks (schema / fact / tone / fabrication). Returns structured JSON {ok, warnings[], blocking_issues[]}. Read-only — does not rewrite output.
Full pattern spec. 8-step execution flow. Priority rule (brand wins over resource). Cost budget. When to add semantic search.

Three checkpoints upgraded with tier/inputs_required/resource_discovery/reasoning layer: 4.4 audience exclusions (binary), 5.4 angle-awareness diversity (contextual with vertical-aware discovery), 6.2 restricted claims (contextual with compliance framework discovery). Pattern demo for incremental upgrade of remaining 37.
Prepend v2.6.17 entry with rationale + known gaps.

post_steps: python3 .skills/memory-index.py  # rebuild index to populate resource chunks
Optional: python3 .skills/discover-resources.py --query "test topic" to smoke-test retrieval.
